children.notes: 这是非正式信件中常用的问候语。
children.statement: 这是一种询问他人近况的方式。
children.explanation: 意为“最近进展如何？”或“你好吗？”

children.text: I have some rules at home.
children.statement: 句中的 'some' 修饰不可数名词。
children.explanation: rule 在这里是可数名词，其复数形式为 rules。

children.text: In the morning, I have to make my bed and clean my room before I go to school.
children.cn: 在早上，我必须在去上学前整理床铺并打扫房间。
children.notes: make one's bed 是固定短语，表示“整理床铺”。
children.statement: ‘have to’ 强调客观上的必要性。

children.text: I must also hurry because I can't be late for class.
children.cn: 我还必须快点，因为我不能上课迟到。
children.notes: be late for 意为“做某事迟到”。
children.explanation: 情态动词后跟动词原形是基本语法。

children.text: After school, I have to finish my homework before dinner every day.
children.cn: 放学后，我每天必须在晚饭前完成作业。
children.notes: finish doing sth. 表示“做完某事”。
children.explanation: after 是介词，school 是名词。

children.text: I can't play computer games or hang out with friends on weekdays.
children.cn: 在工作日，我不能玩电脑游戏，也不能和朋友出去玩。
children.notes: hang out 意为“闲逛”或“（和朋友）出去玩”。
children.explanation: weekday 意为工作日，weekend 才是周末。

children.text: My parents are very strict, and I think some rules are a bit boring.
children.cn: 我的父母非常严厉，我觉得有些规矩有点无聊。
children.notes: be strict with sb. 意为“对某人要求严厉”。
children.explanation: boring 修饰事物（rules），bored 修饰人的心情。

children.text: However, I should follow them because they help me develop good habits and focus on my studies.
children.cn: 然而，我应该遵守它们，因为它们帮助我养成好习惯并专注于学习。
children.notes: focus on 意为“集中注意力于……”。
children.statement: ‘However’ 表示转折，通常用逗号隔开。
children.explanation: 作为副词，however 常用于句首表示转折。

children.text: I hope I will be allowed to watch TV or listen to music for a while on weekends.
children.cn: 我希望周末我能被允许看一会儿电视或听一会儿音乐。
children.notes: be allowed to do sth. 意为“被允许做某事”。
children.explanation: 这是一个固定的时间短语。
children.keywords: allowed, watch TV, for a while
